metrics_note: relevance >= 1 counts as relevant for Recall/Precision/MRR/nDCG; exact-span metrics require relevance == 2. Judgments are keyed on the stable (tradition, work, locator) record identity, never on retrieval position, and are judged against source records, not generated prose.

judging.agreement_required_at: backend-selection decision gate (candidate vs. baseline), deferred to ADR 0007
judging.disclosure: retrieval-v1 baseline judgments are a single-curator pass; no second independent judge exists for the baseline, so no inter-annotator-agreement figure is available (reported as n/a, not fabricated). Per docs/benchmarks/retrieval-v1.md, >=2 independent judges and an IAA figure are required when a candidate backend is compared against this baseline at the decision gate, not to establish the baseline measurement itself. The labels here are deliberately objective (exact quotes, locators, and source-grounded paraphrase/theme calls each carry a rationale) to bound that subjectivity for the baseline.

relevant.rationale: Canonical span is exactly the quoted phrase 己所不欲,勿施於人.
Canonical span begins with the exact phrase 上善若水.
色即是空 is a verbatim substring of the 心經 canonical span.
Work + chapter + opening words 為學日益 identify this record.
Work + chapter:verse locator identify this record uniquely.
Work + named chapter + locator match this record.
Exact semantic equivalent of the Golden Rule (己所不欲,勿施於人).
Direct paraphrase: act without attachment to the results of action.
Same teaching of acting while renouncing attachment (棄絕執著).
Source enjoins 行公義,好憐憫,存謙卑 — exactly the paraphrase's content.
諸行無常,是生滅法;生滅滅已,寂滅為樂 directly addresses death and impermanence.
靈魂不生亦不滅;身體被殺時它並不被殺 — directly on death.
朝聞道,夕死可矣 — a contextual stance toward death.
引我從死亡至不朽 — a prayer to be led from death to immortality; contextual to facing death.
愛人如己 — love your neighbour as yourself.
兼愛: regard others' persons as your own — universal love of others.
神愛世人 — God's love for people; contextual to the theme of love.
Span carries the romanization Tat tvam asi (彼即是你).
Span carries 舉意(niyyah) — actions are judged by intention.

irrelevant_notes.reason: Off-corpus topic (modern finance / blockchain); no record provides direct support, and any lexical overlap is spurious.
Off-corpus topic (consumer electronics); no record provides direct support.

relevant.rationale: 道可道,非常道 — the primary Taoist sense of 道.
道法自然 — also centrally about 道.
道就是神 — Logos rendered 道; a different sense of the same term.
朝聞道,夕死可矣 — the Confucian moral 道; another sense.
道可道,非常道 — directly on 道.
道法自然 — directly on 道 and 自然, both in the query.
為道日損 — about 道, contextual.

irrelevant_notes.reason: 道德經 8 (上善若水) and 道德經 58 (禍福相倚) share the work but are not about 道/自然 specifically; they must still keep distinct occurrence identity from the relevant 道德經 records.

relevant.rationale: 法句經 record; matches the requested work.
Second distinct 法句經 record; different locator, must be a distinct occurrence.
